props.name: imageSrc
props.description: The source URL of the image.

props.name: containerHeight
props.description: Height of the overall card container.

props.name: containerWidth
props.description: Width of the overall card container.

props.name: rotateAmplitude
props.description: Controls how much the card tilts with mouse movement.

props.name: showMobileWarning
props.description: Whether to show a small alert about mobile usage.

props.name: showTooltip
props.description: Toggles the visibility of the tooltip (figcaption).

props.name: displayOverlayContent
props.description: Whether to display any overlayContent on top of the image.

props.name: overlayContent
props.description: A React node to display as an overlay on the card.
